X : ι → Ω → ℝ
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝ : SigmaFiniteFiltration μ 𝓕
hX : Submartingale X 𝓕 μ
τ : ℕ → Ω → WithTop ι
hτ : ∀ (i : ℕ), IsStoppingTime 𝓕 (τ i)
n : ι
hτ_le : ∀ (i : ℕ) (ω : Ω), τ i ω ≤ ↑n
⊢ UniformIntegrable (fun i => stoppedValue X (τ i)) 1 μ

haveI : IsFiniteMeasure μ := hX.isFiniteMeasure
  refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated_singleton (p := 1) le_rfl (by simp)
    (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <| (hX.integrable n).add (hX.integrable ⊥).neg)
    (fun i ↦ (hX.adapted.stoppedValue_stronglyMeasurable (hτ i) hτ_le).aestronglyMeasurable)
    (fun i ↦ ?_)
  filter_upwards [stoppedValue_sub_le_max_sub hX.adapted hX (hτ i) (fun ω ↦ hτ_le i ω)] with ω hω
  rw [Real.norm_eq_abs]
  calc |stoppedValue X (τ i) ω| 
      ≤ |X n ω| + |X ⊥ ω| := by
        have h1 : X ⊥ ω ≤ stoppedValue X (τ i) ω := by
          apply hX.2.2 ⊥ _ bot_le (hτ i).measurableSet_eq_bot
          exact fun ω' hω' ↦ by simp only [stoppedValue, hω']
        have h2 : stoppedValue X (τ i) ω ≤ X n ω := hω
        rcases le_or_lt 0 (stoppedValue X (τ i) ω) with hpos | hneg
        · rw [abs_of_nonneg hpos]
          calc stoppedValue X (τ i) ω ≤ X n ω := h2
            _ ≤ |X n ω| := le_abs_self _
            _ ≤ |X n ω| + |X ⊥ ω| := le_add_of_nonneg_right (abs_nonneg _)
        · rw [abs_of_neg hneg]
          calc -stoppedValue X (τ i) ω ≤ -X ⊥ ω := neg_le_neg h1
            _ ≤ |X ⊥ ω| := neg_le_abs _
            _ ≤ |X n ω| + |X ⊥ ω| := le_add_of_nonneg_left (abs_nonneg _)
      _ = X n ω + -X ⊥ ω + (|X n ω| - X n ω + (|X ⊥ ω| + X ⊥ ω)) := by ring
      _ ≤ X n ω + -X ⊥ ω + (0 + (|X ⊥ ω| + |X ⊥ ω|)) := by
          gcongr
          · linarith [le_abs_self (X n ω)]
          · linarith [neg_abs_le (X ⊥ ω)]
      _ ≤ |X n ω + -X ⊥ ω| + (0 + (|X ⊥ ω| + |X ⊥ ω|)) := by gcongr; exact le_abs_self _
      _ = _ := by simp [Real.norm_eq_abs]; ring
